context_values.response.specify:
Both required artifacts are produced. Here's what the `agent-integration` lane concluded:

`‚òÖ Insight ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ`
The lane discovered a **two-phase readiness structure** in `agent:experience`: Slices 1‚Äì2 (`agent_context.rs`, `journal.rs`) are genuinely unblocked right now because they depend only on the already-trusted `tui:shell`. Slices 3‚Äì9 are integration slices ‚Äî they require the `myosu-play` binary as a dispatch vehicle, which `play:tui` Slice 1 must create first. The most important shared action is the **robopoker git migration**, which blocks CI across all product lanes simultaneously.
`‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ`

---

## Summary

**Judgment**: KEEP ‚Äî proceed with phased implementation

### Decision

| Phase | Slices | Action |
|-------|--------|--------|
| **Phase 0** | Slices 1‚Äì2 (`agent_context.rs`, `journal.rs`) | Proceed immediately ‚Äî no `myosu-play` binary required |
| **Phase 1+** | Slices 3‚Äì9 | Defer until `play:tui` Slice 1 (binary skeleton) completes |
| **Parallel** | `robopoker` git migration | `games:traits` lane should resolve ‚Äî unblocks CI for all lanes |

### Required Artifacts Produced

- **`outputs/agent-integration/agent-adapter.md`** (10.7 KB) ‚Äî Maps `agent:experience` integration surfaces to `play:tui` ownership. Traces every flag (`--context`, `--narrate`, `--spectate`) to the `myosu-play` binary. Shows slice dependencies and honest Phase 0 vs Phase 1+ readiness.
- **`outputs/agent-integration/review.md`** (7.8 KB) ‚Äî Explicit KEEP judgment with rationale. Identifies 4 blockers by severity (CRITICAL: `myosu-play` binary + robopoker git migration; HIGH: `myosu-games-poker`; LOW: socket path convention). States the critical path: `play:tui` Slice 1 gates `agent:experience` Phase 1+.

### Critical Path

```
games:traits (robopoker git migration) ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚ñ∫ unblocks CI everywhere
play:tui Slice 1 (binary skeleton) ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚ñ∫ unblocks agent:experience Phase 1+
play:tui Slice 2 (NLHE renderer) ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚ñ∫ unblocks SpectatorRelay integration
```

The product does not need another upstream spec or planning lane. It needs implementation of `play:tui` Slice 1 and parallel resolution of the robopoker git migration.

- `outputs/agent-integration/agent-adapter.md`
- `outputs/agent-integration/review.md`
